## Workspace development focus
- Build AI-native product features with architecture-first thinking.
- Prefer specification, planning, validation, and documentation before large implementation changes.
- Keep domain logic separate from UI and isolate AI provider integrations behind clear boundaries.
- Treat AI output as untrusted input and validate external data.
- Maintain strong quality standards for accessibility, testing, observability, and maintainability.
